summary: Tested Members module multilingual support, delete functionality, and grouping logic. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with screenshots showing Staff/Players grouping, delete confirmation dialog, and import dialog with multilingual info.

delete_member_endpoint.description: DELETE /api/members/{member_id} - Permanently deletes member and all related data (attendance, stats, payments, etc.)

delete_requires_admin.description: Only admin users can delete members

cannot_delete_own_account.description: Admin cannot delete their own account

multilingual_import_pt.description: Import CSV with Portuguese headers (Nome, Apelido, Data de Nascimento, Email, Função)

multilingual_import_es.description: Import CSV with Spanish headers (Nombre, Apellido, Fecha de Nacimiento, Email, Rol)

multilingual_import_fr.description: Import CSV with French headers (Prénom, Nom, Date de Naissance, Email, Fonction)

multilingual_import_it.description: Import CSV with Italian headers (Nome, Cognome, Data di Nascita, Email, Ruolo)

multilingual_import_en.description: Import CSV with English headers (First Name, Surname, Date of Birth, Email, Role)

role_mapping_portuguese.description: Role mapping: treinador, treinador adjunto, delegado, jogador, responsável, gestor desportivo

role_mapping_spanish.description: Role mapping: entrenador, entrenador asistente, jugador, responsable

role_mapping_french.description: Role mapping: entraîneur, entraîneur adjoint, délégué, joueur

role_mapping_italian.description: Role mapping: allenatore, allenatore in seconda, giocatore

role_mapping_english.description: Role mapping: coach, assistant coach, delegate, player, guardian, sports manager

member_grouping_team_view.description: Team view shows Staff and Players sections with proper icons (Briefcase for Staff, UsersRound for Players)

member_grouping_admin_view.description: Admin/Club view shows single list sorted by name

translation_keys.description: Translation keys exist for all roles: admin, sports_manager, coach, assistant_coach, delegate, player, guardian

delete_ui_flow.description: Delete Member option in dropdown menu, confirmation dialog with warning about irreversible action

endpoints_tested: POST /api/members/import - Multilingual header mapping (PT, ES, FR, IT, EN)
GET /api/members - Get paginated members with team_role

members_page.staff_players_grouping: Working - Team view shows STAFF and PLAYERS sections
members_page.delete_option: Working - Delete Member option in dropdown menu
members_page.delete_confirmation: Working - Dialog shows warning about irreversible action
members_page.import_dialog: Working - Shows expected columns, valid roles, valid positions

critical_code_review_comments: DELETE endpoint correctly removes member from all teams, linked_player_ids, attendance, player_stats, unavailabilities, payments, push_subscriptions, and messages
Import endpoint supports 5 languages (PT, ES, FR, IT, EN) for all column headers
Role mapping supports variations in all 5 languages (e.g., 'treinador', 'coach', 'entrenador', 'entraîneur', 'allenatore')
MemberRow component correctly uses getTranslatedRoleName for multilingual role display
groupedMembers logic correctly separates Staff and Players based on STAFF_ROLES array
Translation keys defined for all 7 roles in all 5 languages
seed_data_creation: Test members created during testing were cleaned up via delete endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Members module multilingual support fully tested. DELETE endpoint works correctly with proper validation (admin only, cannot delete self, cannot delete admins). Import supports 5 languages for headers and role mapping. Team view shows Staff/Players grouping. All 18 pytest tests pass.

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCKED - Resend email requires user API key
